name: gain_controller
description: Arousal/attention modulator. Two CH pacemakers with gap junction synchronization. Silent at baseline tonic (2.5mA, below CH bifurcation ~3.78). When driven by sensory input via RS relay, CH neurons begin oscillating — stronger input = faster oscillation = more output spikes. The CH output modulates downstream circuits (command, motor) as an amplitude signal. RS relay filters brief noise from sustained drive. Use case: arousal from touch, attention scaling, global sensitivity control.
